phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'ingresso principale del mercato, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH ling-GRES-so preen-chee-PAH-leh del mer-CAH-to, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Sotto il ponte, lato San Polo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOHT-toh EEL POHN-teh LAH-toh SAHN POH-loh
likely_response.translation_en: Under the bridge, San Polo side.

responses.english: Under the bridge, San Polo side.
responses.phonetic: SOHT-toh EEL POHN-teh LAH-toh SAHN POH-loh
responses.french: Sotto il ponte, lato San Polo.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora apre la pescheria, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-ra AH-preh la pes-keh-REE-ah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, il mercato è aperto oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, il mer-CAH-to eh a-PER-to OD-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, posso pagare con la carta qui, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, POS-so pa-GAH-reh kon la KAR-ta kwee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si trova l'Erberia, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see TRO-va ler-beh-REE-ah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Accanto alla pescheria, verso il ponte.
likely_response.pronunciation: ahch-KAHN-toh AHL-lah peh-skeh-REE-ah VEHR-soh EEL POHN-teh
likely_response.translation_en: Next to the fish market, towards the bridge.

responses.english: Next to the fish market, towards the bridge.
responses.phonetic: ahch-KAHN-toh AHL-lah peh-skeh-REE-ah VEHR-soh EEL POHN-teh
responses.french: Accanto alla pescheria, verso il ponte.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove posso mangiare cicheti vicino, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh POS-so man-JAH-reh cheh-KEH-tee vi-CI-no, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Ci sono osterie vicino al mercato.
likely_response.pronunciation: CHEE SOH-noh oh-steh-REE-eh vee-CHEE-noh AHL mehr-KAH-toh
likely_response.translation_en: There are eateries near the market.

responses.english: There are eateries near the market.
responses.phonetic: CHEE SOH-noh oh-steh-REE-eh vee-CHEE-noh AHL mehr-KAH-toh
responses.french: Ci sono osterie vicino al mercato.
